metadata.description: Indonesian and Indonesian-English code-mixed MFR dictionary for MultiLexNorm-style lexical normalization.
metadata.automatic_replacement_policy: Use only high_confidence_pairs for direct replacement. Use review_pairs and ambiguous_pairs for prompts or manual analysis.
notes: id and iden are separated because identical raw forms can map to different standard forms, e.g. ga/gak -> enggak in id but -> tidak in iden.
Mention normalization is handled by optional regex/pipeline policy rather than exact raw-token MFR.
